pi_items.verified_value: 6227 is the official French accounting code for 'Frais d'actes et de contentieux' (Legal fees and litigation costs), not for organic certification fees
pi_items.source: French Plan Comptable Général verified through Pennylane, L'Expert Comptable, Indy.fr, and other official French accounting resources
Task description specifies account name as 'Frais de certification biologique' which contains the keyword 'certification'
Task description specifies account name as 'Frais de certification biologique' which contains the keyword 'biologique' (organic)

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a custom chart of accounts entry in Ekylibre, an open-source farm management information system. The account number 6227 has keywords 'certification' and 'biologique' present in the name 'Frais de certification biologique' (Organic certification fees). However, account 6227 officially designates 'Frais d'actes et de contentieux' (Legal fees and litigation costs) in the French Plan Comptable Général, so this represents a non-standard usage. Ekylibre permits custom chart of accounts configurations, making this intentionally non-standard usage legitimate for the task. The data is synthetic and created specifically for this UI automation task.
